title: pteris aquilina var. caudata
intro: Pteris aquilina var. caudata, also known as the caudate bracken fern or caudate fern, is a variety of the Pteris aquilina plant, which is a type of fern commonly found in tropical and subtropical regions. Traditionally, this plant is used for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which are believed to aid in the treatment of various health issues, such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Pteris aquilina var. caudata include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
